### Design Reference

## Implementation Checklist

### Visual
- [ ] Typography improvements
- [ ] Spacing adjustments
- [ ] Color/contrast fixes
- [ ] Layout enhancements

### Interaction
- [ ] Hover states
- [ ] Focus states
- [ ] Active states
- [ ] Loading states
- [ ] Error states

### Animation
- [ ] Entrance animations
- [ ] Exit animations
- [ ] Micro-interactions
- [ ] Reduced motion support

### Responsive
- [ ] Mobile (< 768px)
- [ ] Tablet (768px - 1024px)
- [ ] Desktop (> 1024px)
- [ ] Ultra-wide (> 1440px)

### Accessibility
- [ ] Color contrast (WCAG AA)
- [ ] Keyboard navigation
- [ ] Screen reader labels
- [ ] Focus indicators

### Performance
- [ ] Lighthouse Performance ≥ 90
- [ ] No layout shift
- [ ] Optimized images
- [ ] Minimal JS

## After Screenshots
**After:**
<!-- Add after screenshot -->

## Testing

### Devices Tested
- [ ] iPhone SE
- [ ] iPhone 14 Pro
- [ ] iPad Mini
- [ ] iPad Pro
- [ ] Desktop Chrome
- [ ] Desktop Safari
- [ ] Desktop Firefox

### Accessibility Testing
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Screen reader compatible
- [ ] Color contrast passes
- [ ] Reduced motion respected
